title: Production Operator / Technician
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Key Duties and responsibilities included but not limited to:

  • Perform a repetitive and wide range of mechanical assembly operations in support of production projects; perform assembly of complex discrete wire harnesses and multi-conductor jacketed cables, coax, twin-ax, and tri-ax cables, power, and flat cable assemblies.
  • Assembles, modifies reworks, and/or reassembles production components, utilizing drawing, picking tickets, processing documentation, and/or verbal instructions.
  • Prepares and utilizes basic hand tools and machines including but not limited to power screwdriver, ruler, solder iron, clamp machine, heat gun, solder pot, crimpers, pinning machine, and automatic wire strippers.
  • Clean parts prior to production use as required
  • Identify wires with the usage of the basic color code sequence.
  • Participate in first-time production runs of new products.
  • Support cycle counting activity, inventory handling, and inventory transactions following established material procedures.
  • Participates in continuous improvement and team-building activities; maintains productive working relationships with all team members
  • Possesses and maintains thorough knowledge of machines and techniques in this industry and/or similar industries.
  • Meet daily production output & quality requirements

Qualifications:
To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodation may be provided to enable individuals with disabilities to perform essential functions.

  • Responsible for reading, interpreting, and understanding Work Instructions in the assembly of harnesses, cables, and other assigned tasks.
  • Ability to crimp and solder materials.
  • Experience in intricate hand assembly on paced assembly line.

postedCompany.description: NPI SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) (PTE.) LTD., was established in May 2010, and expanded in March 2013. The plant brings local support and manufacturing to our customers in the Asia Pacific using our cutting edge technology that ensures fast and reliable service. The expansion is in line with our company's plan to increase our box build footprint and to install cable harness manufacturing and to provide us the leverage and increase our production flow and streamline our warehouse.
